thread.title: Self-Evolving Agents (自进化 agent 系统)
thread.definitionDraft: Self-evolving agents improve themselves after deployment based on interaction data and environment feedback, rather than staying static with pre-deployment human configuration — improving above the weights via verbal reflection, accumulated skills/memory, or rewriting their own prompts, tools and code.
thread.whyNow: In 2025 the Darwin Gödel Machine let an agent rewrite its own code and lifted SWE-bench from 20% to 50%, the first engineering proof that open-ended recursive self-improvement is achievable for coding agents; MIT Technology Review listed "AI learning to improve itself" as a defining 2025 direction.
thread.useBoundary: Focus on agents that improve themselves at runtime (self-reflection, skill/memory accumulation, self-modifying code). Exclude training-side self-reward/self-distillation (model-training) and human-designed automation loops (loop-engineering).

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.whyRelevant: DGM 官方开源，自改代码 agent 的种群进化实现。
sources.text:
jennyzzt/dgm (Darwin Gödel Machine)

DGM 官方开源，自改代码 agent 的种群进化实现。

edges.evidenceNote: DGM 以 Schmidhuber 的 Gödel Machine 为理论谱系与命名来源，改用经验验证替代形式化证明。
同作者线（Hu/Lu/Clune），DGM 把 ADAS 的"meta agent 编程出新 agent"推进到 agent 自改自身代码。
综述把 Reflexion 列为自进化反馈闭环的奠基范式之一。
综述把 Voyager 的 skill library 作为"技能积累"维度的代表。
Reflexion 把 STaR"从自身正确输出学习"从训练侧推广到推理时的语言反馈循环。
两者都用"同一 LLM 自我验证/自我反馈再精炼"的无训练迭代机制。
权威媒体报道直接以 DGM 为"AI 自我改进"的代表案例。
jennyzzt/dgm 是 DGM 论文的官方开源实现。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 17 sources / 8 edges, arXiv ids verified (2303.11366 Reflexion, 2305.16291 Voyager, 2203.14465 STaR, 2303.17651 Self-Refine, 2505.22954 DGM, 2408.08435 ADAS, 2508.07407 + 2507.21046 surveys). Schmidhuber Gödel Machine via IDSIA official page. Roles all >=2.
